description: Fix zod version mismatch in plugin scaffolding template. The scaffold generates zod ^3.0.0 but the plugin-sdk requires zod ^4.0.0, causing newly created plugins to fail at build time.

userStories.title: Fix scaffold.ts zod version from ^3.0.0 to ^4.0.0
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want newly scaffolded plugins to have the correct zod version so that `opentabs build` works without manual dependency fixes.
acceptanceCriteria: peerDependencies.zod in generatePackageJson() is '^4.0.0' (line 79 of scaffold.ts)
devDependencies.zod in generatePackageJson() is '^4.0.0' (line 93 of scaffold.ts)
userStories.notes: File: platform/cli/src/scaffold.ts, function generatePackageJson(). Line 79: change peerDependencies zod from '^3.0.0' to '^4.0.0'. Line 93: change devDependencies zod from '^3.0.0' to '^4.0.0'. The plugin-sdk (platform/plugin-sdk/package.json line 25) already declares peerDependencies zod '^4.0.0'. Existing plugins (plugins/slack/, plugins/e2e-test/) already use zod 4.x. This is a two-character change in two places. No other files need modification.
